description: You are a SCADA technician configuring HMI-level fallback pump sequencing logic for a municipal wastewater plant's Lift Station A (LS-A) in Red Lion Crimson 3.0. Using the IO tag register and Ten States engineering elevations located in the CrimsonTasks folder on the Desktop, configure four data tags for LS-A. The LSA_Level tag must include Analog Scaling to map raw PLC values to elevations in feet, along with four event triggers to actuate the Lead Pump, Lag Pump, and High Alarm flags based on the Ten States specification. Both pump command flags must reset to 0 when the level reaches the Pumps Off elevation. Do not configure tags for Lift Station B. Save the completed project as 'wastewater_lift_station.c3' in C:\Users\Docker\Documents\CrimsonProjects\. Login credentials: Docker / GymAnything123!
